reviews.review_title: Game is good but just so annoying
reviews.review_description:
I’m mainly just reviewing for a free ball but to be honest about the game is that it’s annoying asl.
The techniques you HAVE to learn in this game makes your hand crack. Playing online is so annoying because everyone’s WiFi isn’t the same. This causes the ball to spaz out everywhere and sometimes you just loose the ball by a defender 15 feet away.

Overall: 8.5-9

This game is great, you can make friends, get trophies, make a team, and have fun. But this game also has some down falls, sometimes when u shoot says that it doesn’t go in even though it goes in. Another thing is that the ball glitches like when u hit the ball when someone else hits it it goes in or it doesn’t. Also the game glitches when you make a name it sometimes doesn’t let u have that name. Another thing is that people time waste and it get annoying. Also they should add a referee that is a real person in a public or tournament. Last thing is that people are toxic even though you did nothing.
Vrfs please do an update for this in 2026-2027.

reviews.review_title: All of my cc item got removed
reviews.review_description: So I logged on one day say saw that my cc items were gone, so I just thought it was a glitch bc they came back about 2 hours later. But fast forward a week and they are gone. I tried removing the game and downloaded it back and that didn’t fix it. But I also have abt 45 of the cc boots alone but they didn’t disappear until some random day. I bought some new items and thought it would fix abt 20 mins ago and only could see one of the boots at a time. Well I bought a random boot from Scotlandboy and never saved it and proceeded to buy another boot.”I I mean not saving it by not making an outfit.” And it said I spend the credits but I don’t have any of the cc items the only ones I have is the ones I have made outfits with and can’t get the other one I don’t use and want to use back.

Best game ever so much good people and you make soooooooooooo many friends and you even get better at soccer! Yes that’s right on a ￼vr you can get better at real life things! And the fashion is REALLY nowadays and REALLY good. Also it’s like other games because it has a battle pass and a LOT of cosmetics. And you can even level up! I have been playing for a while and I’m level 847 overall and it’s fun to flex that and it tells you how good your shooting is your goalkeeper skills and many others! Also I like how it tell you your levels because it tells you what you need to practice on and you don’t.Also I love to either just play a game with people, but you can even play in practice mode with other people and either try to get better or just hang out! And you can add your friends and play with them and join them whenever! Lastly 
it’s REALLY fun to try and score a CRAZY goal and do fun trick shots and do nowadays dribbling like the rainbow flick or the elastica  and many many more! I WOULD￼ HIGHLY RECOMMEND GETTING THIS GAME!!! It’s all free and open!!!!

I enjoy shooting around in practice, but when it comes to actual matches the game feels a bit like a buggy mess. I find joy playing gk but if I catch or block the ball it shouldn't keep going into the goal. I've had 5 times in one match where I block the ball with my hands and feet but the ball still goes in. If the game becomes less of a buggy and ping filled mess in actual matches I might consider playing again

The sensation of sprinting on a virtual pitch is unmatched, especially in multiplayer modes ranging from 1v1 to 6v6. The visual fidelity, inspired by top-tier VR projects, makes you feel like you are standing in a real stadium. The haptic feedback allows you to feel the impact of the ball, making a well-timed strike immensely satisfying.

reviews.review_title: Pure script, not just a game.
reviews.review_description: You can't play this game normally, because it's just against you. Unrealistic ping, too many bugs with the ball, even if the ball does not cross the line, a goal can still be counted (especially in tournaments). We also found one pattern: as soon as in a tournament (2vs2) we score a goal against a team that has 3 times less PING than us, our PING immediately goes up until they tie the score. This happens 90% of the time when the opponents have the British region on their profiles. This game is very weird on all public servers no matter where you play, not counting private servers with friends.

This game is very very good for a free game this is something that I acctually enjoy a lot but something that I don’t like is height glitchers and speed glitchers so you guys could fix that easily but overall this game is a 10/10 because it’s free and has a lot of other cool stuff!!!

In the past few years of playing VRFS, I have enjoyed vrfs to the fullest extent. The game is very fun and collaborative, and can be a fun game to play with friends, but I find that some things like performance when making a map can differ heavily. The only bad thing about vrfs is the racist/homophobic people, which aren’t seen often, but still can be found annoying. Apart from the racism and rudeness of some of the community, this game is a 5 star.
